reconfigure.title: Reconfigure UniFi Controller
reconfigure.description: Update your UniFi controller connection settings.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of your UniFi controller.
data_description.username: A local user account on the UniFi controller.
data_description.password: Password for the UniFi user account.
data_description.site: UniFi site name. Use 'default' for single-site controllers.

devices.title: Select Devices to Track
devices.description: Found {client_count} clients on your UniFi network. Select devices to track for presence detection.

data_description.tracked_devices: Select one or more devices to track for presence detection.

error.already_configured: This UniFi controller and site is already configured
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the UniFi controller
error.no_devices: You must select at least one device to track

abort.already_configured: This UniFi controller and site is already configured
abort.no_devices_discovered: No devices were discovered on this UniFi site

init.title: UniFi Presence Options
init.description: Adjust presence detection settings. Real-time updates are delivered via WebSocket; the fallback poll catches any missed events.

data_description.tracked_devices: Select devices to track for presence detection.
data_description.away_seconds: Number of seconds of inactivity before a device is marked as away.
data_description.fallback_poll_interval: How often to poll the controller as a fallback to WebSocket updates.

error.no_devices: You must select at least one device to track

credentials_rejected.message: Credentials rejected by the UniFi controller

cannot_connect.message: Unable to connect to the UniFi controller at {host}
